reasoning: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (100-cent spread, fast 667.08 < pivot 667.32 < slow 668.08) is the dominant signal. Price 667.1 is 22 cents below pivot, confirming bearish lean. Last 3 RTH bars show 2 red (15:45 and 15:55) with climactic 150k volume on final bar, though bar structure is mixed (RED-GREEN-RED). Contradictory signal: overnight gap UP +1.05 from prior close 666.05, suggesting risk-on overnight momentum. VIX falling (-7.3%) from 25.28 further reduces bearish conviction. Ribbon dominance + price position support bearish, but up gap + mixed bars + declining VIX create meaningful offset. Marginal edge.
